title: Complete MERN Stack Development
description: Master MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js with real-world projects.

lessons.title: Mastering React.js Foundations
lessons.description: Understanding the virtual DOM, functional components, and hooks. Build a powerful UI layer.

lessons.title: Node.js & Server Logic
lessons.description: Dive into the event loop, file systems, and the asynchronous nature of Node.js.

lessons.title: Express.js API Design
lessons.description: Learn middleware, routing, and creating robust RESTful APIs for your MERN applications.

lessons.title: MongoDB Data Architecture
lessons.description: Understand NoSQL, Mongoose schemas, and high-performance database management.
